deployment_strengths: Package structure is complete and judge-facing.
Bundle scripts run end to end on packaged example data.
Dashboard can be launched from inside the package.
deployment_gaps: No bundle-local trained pkl artifact yet.
Prediction path is not yet backed by isolated bundle-local model loading.
Runtime still depends on shared repository modules.
recommended_next_steps: Train and save a real hist gradient boosting pipeline to models/rul_model.pkl.
Switch bundle prediction to artifact-backed inference.
Make bundle dashboard read only bundle-local outputs.
